title: Alphabet & Sounds Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A round fruit that is sweet and crunchy. It can be red or green.
rounds.explanation: apple: A round fruit that is sweet and crunchy. It can be red or green.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The bright light we see in the night sky.
rounds.explanation: moon: The bright light we see in the night sky.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A round toy on a string that rolls down and up.
rounds.explanation: yo-yo: A round toy on a string that rolls down and up.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A round toy that you can throw, kick and bounce.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A light toy that flies high in the sky on a string.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Something you hold over your head to stay dry in rain.

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: I eat an apple after school.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
Build the complete model sentence.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

rounds.prompt: Which word completes the sentence: ___ cat sat on the mat.
rounds.explanation: The is our sight word and it goes before cat; the other words are already used in the sentence.

rounds.prompt: Which word completes the sentence: I ___ a cat.
rounds.explanation: See is a doing word that fits after I; moon, hat and pen are naming words, so they do not work here.

rounds.prompt: Which sentence begins with a capital letter?
rounds.explanation: Only this one starts with the capital letter I; the others start with small i, s and c.

games.title: Reading Detective
games.description: Use unit evidence to solve each reading clue.

rounds.prompt: The plan says q is special. Which letter almost always comes with q?
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: u

rounds.prompt: The plan changes cat to hat. Which word comes next?
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: Hut

rounds.prompt: How many Week 5 sight words can you read by Week 6?
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: 15

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.prompt: Sound and say 1
rounds.target: the /a/ sound five times, then find things that begin with it.

rounds.prompt: Sound and say 3
rounds.target: Hiss like a snake for the /s/ sound.

rounds.prompt: Sound and say 5

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: My yo-yo goes up and down.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: I see the moon at night.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'pen' mean in this unit?
choices: A thin tool with ink that we write with.
A round fruit that is sweet and crunchy. It can be red or green.
A pet animal that barks, wags its tail and likes long walks.
rounds.answer: A thin tool with ink that we write with.
rounds.explanation: pen: A thin tool with ink that we write with.

rounds.prompt: What does 'the' mean in this unit?
choices: A round fruit that is sweet and crunchy. It can be red or green.
A pet animal that barks, wags its tail and likes long walks.
A small word we put before a naming word, like 'the cat'.
rounds.answer: A small word we put before a naming word, like 'the cat'.
rounds.explanation: the: A small word we put before a naming word, like 'the cat'.

rounds.prompt: What does 'dog' mean in this unit?
choices: A farm animal with horns that gives us milk.
A pet animal that barks, wags its tail and likes long walks.
A round fruit that is sweet and crunchy. It can be red or green.
rounds.answer: A pet animal that barks, wags its tail and likes long walks.
rounds.explanation: dog: A pet animal that barks, wags its tail and likes long walks.

games.title: Word Type Power
games.description: Identify how each vocabulary word works in English.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'van'?
rounds.explanation: van is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'it'?
rounds.explanation: it is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'jam'?
rounds.explanation: jam is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 1.
pairs: A soft pet animal that says miaow and has long whiskers.
A farm animal with horns that gives us milk.
A light toy that flies high in the sky on a string.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 2.
pairs: A round juicy fruit with a thick orange skin.
The big hot star that gives us light in the day.
A clear drink with no colour. We need it every day.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 3.
pairs: A small word you use when you talk about yourself.
To look at something and know it with your eyes.
A small word for you and other people together.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: Which word begins with the /s/ sound?
rounds.explanation: Sun starts with s, so we hear /s/; moon, dog and hat begin with /m/, /d/ and /h/.

rounds.prompt: Blend these sounds: c - a - t. Which word do you get?
rounds.explanation: The middle sound is /a/ and the last sound is /t/, so c-a-t says cat, not cap or can.

rounds.prompt: Blend these sounds: s - u - n. Which word do you get?
rounds.explanation: The last sound is /n/, so s-u-n says sun; sum ends with /m/ and run begins with /r/.

games.title: Unit Mission
games.description: Finish with a mixed challenge across the whole unit.

rounds.prompt: Which capital letter matches the small letter a?
rounds.explanation: Small a is written as capital A; B, D and O are the partners of b, d and o.

rounds.prompt: Which small letter matches the capital letter M?
rounds.explanation: Capital M is written as small m; w is m turned over, and n and s are different letters.

rounds.prompt: Which word begins with the /b/ sound?
rounds.explanation: Ball starts with b, so we hear /b/; cat starts with /c/, sun with /s/ and fish with /f/.
